delhi.label: Critical
tips: Delhi has 10M+ vehicles — use Metro when possible
Avoid burning crop waste — contributes 30% of winter smog
Switch to LED bulbs — reduces home energy CO₂ by 40%

london.label: Good
tips: Use TfL's cycle hire — cycling emits 0g CO₂ vs 170g/km by car
London's grid is 50%+ renewable — great time to switch to EV
Insulate your home — heating is London's biggest residential emission

tokyo.label: Moderate
tips: Japan's bullet trains are 12x greener than domestic flights
Nuclear restart debate — supporting renewable energy policy matters
Japanese recycling is world-class — separate your 10 categories!

new york.label: Moderate
tips: NYC subway is one of the greenest transit systems in the US
Buildings account for 70% of NYC emissions — push for retrofits
Local food from NY farms cuts food miles by up to 90%

mumbai.label: Poor
tips: Mumbai's local trains carry 7M people/day — use them over autos
Dharavi recycling model is world-famous — support informal recyclers
Switch to solar water heaters — Mumbai gets 300 sunny days/year

berlin.label: Good
tips: Berlin's cycling network is 1,300km — bike over car for short trips
Germany's Energiewende is pushing 80% renewables by 2030
District heating systems in Berlin are very efficient — opt in

default.label: Moderate
tips: Switch to renewable energy provider
Reduce meat consumption — livestock = 14.5% of global emissions
Use public transport or cycle for daily commute
